mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cers_university (university_name, location, city, type, is_985, is_211, is_double_first, level, web_url) VALUES (#{universityName}, #{location}, #{city}, #{type}, #{is985}, #{is211}, #{isDoubleFirst}, #{level}, #{webUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE cers_university SET university_name = #{universityName}, location = #{location}, city = #{city}, type = #{type}, is_985 = #{is985}, is_211 = #{is211}, is_double_first = #{isDoubleFirst}, level = #{level}, web_url = #{webUrl} WHERE university_id = #{universityId}
